Q & A… Is f (x) = 2x a power function? No. A power function contains a variable base raised to a fixed power. This function has a constant base raised to a variable power. This is called an exponential function, not a power function. Example 1 Identifying Power Functions Which of the following functions are power functions?
√ — x ​ Cube root function Solution All of the listed functions are power functions. The constant and identity functions are power functions because they can be written as f (x) = x0 and f (x) = x1 respectively. The quadratic and cubic functions are power functions with whole number powers f (x) = x 2 and f (x) = x 3. Th reciprocal and reciprocal squared functions are power functions with negative whole number powers because they can be written as f (x) = x −1 and f (x) = x −2. The square and cube root functions are power functions with fractional powers because they can be written as f (x) = x1/2 or f (x) = x 1/3. Try It #1 Which functions are power functions? f (x) = 2x 2 ⋅ 4x 3 g(x) = −x 5 + 5x 3 h(x) = ​ 2x5 − 1 _ 3x2 + 4 ​ Identifying End Behavior of Power Functions Figure 2 shows the graphs of f (x) = x 2, g(x) = x 4 and h(x) = x 6, which are all power functions with even, whole-number powers. supplements.curriculum_md_raw:
# 指数函数

## 基本信息
- **学科**: 数学
- **学段**: 高中
- **年级**: 高中10年级
- **章节**: 函数
- **知识点**: 指数函数
- **课标版本**: 普通高中课程标准（2017年版2020年修订）

---

## 一、课标原文

### 1.1 内容要求
> （数学 10年级）指数函数的内容要求。学生应理解指数函数的基本概念，掌握基本方法，能运用所学知识解决简单的实际问题。

### 1.2 学业要求
> 学生能准确描述指数函数的相关概念，能进行基本的运算和推理，能解决与指数函数相关的实际问题，形成初步的数学思维和素养。

### 1.3 教学提示
> 教学时应注重从学生熟悉的生活情境入手，引导学生通过具体操作、观察、归纳等方式理解指数函数的概念。注重知识的发生发展过程，帮助学生建立知识之间的联系。

---

## 二、教学目标

### 2.1 知识与技能
- 学生能够理解指数函数的概念、性质和运算方法
- 学生能够正确进行相关计算和推理
- 学生能够识别和描述相关的数学对象
- 学生能够理解指数函数的概念、性质和运算方法

### 2.2 过程与方法
- 学生经历通过观察、归纳、类比等数学活动，经历概念的形成过程
- 学生能够运用数学思想方法解决问题
- 学生能够在交流中表达自己的思路
- 学生经历通过观察、归纳、类比等数学活动，经历概念的形成过程

### 2.3 情感态度与价值观
- 学生感受数学来源于生活又服务于生活
- 学生体验数学探究的乐趣，树立学好数学的信心
- 学生养成认真细致、独立思考的学习习惯
- 学生感受数学来源于生活又服务于生活

---

## 三、教学重难点

### 3.1 教学重点
- 指数函数的基本内容和基本方法
- 形成完整的知识体系结构
- 指数函数的基本内容和基本方法
- 形成完整的知识体系结构

### 3.2 教学难点
- 理解指数函数的本质，灵活运用知识解决问题
- 建立知识之间的联系，实现知识的迁移应用

SECTION 5.2  Power Functions and Polynomial Functions

Q & A…
Is f (x) = 2x a power function?
No. A power function contains a variable base raised to a fixed power. This function has a constant base raised to a
variable power. This is called an exponential function, not a power function.
Example  1
Identifying Power Functions
Which of the following functions are power functions?

f (x) = 1
Constant function

f (x) = x
Identify function

supplements.textbook_summary:
## 教材化讲解参考（由课标要点生成）

### 核心概念
指数函数是数学学习中的重要知识点。教学时应围绕课标要点“内容包括：函数概念与性质、幂函数、指数函数、对数函数、三角函数、函数应用。”展开，先明确概念边界，再通过例子、图示、实验、语篇或案例帮助学生建立可迁移的理解。

### 学习路径
1. 情境导入：从具体情境或图形表征切入，引导学生发现「指数函数」中的数量关系，再抽象为符号、公式或模型。
2. 探究建构：采用“操作体验—表达归纳—变式应用”的路径，帮助学生把直观经验转化为可迁移的数学方法。
3. 应用迁移：围绕课标要点“内容包括：函数概念与性质、幂函数、指数函数、对数函数、三角函数、函数应用。”，设置一题多解、数形结合或实际应用任务。

### 例题设计方向
可设计一道“识别核心概念”的基础题，一道“解释现象或文本材料”的理解题，一道“迁移到真实情境”的应用题，并要求学生说明依据。

Q & A… Is f (x) = 2x a power function? No. A power function contains a variable base raised to a fixed power. This function has a constant base raised to a variable power. This is called an exponential function, not a power function. Example 1 Identifying Power Functions Which of the following functions are power functions?
√ — x ​ Cube root function Solution All of the listed functions are power functions. The constant and identity functions are power functions because they can be written as f (x) = x0 and f (x) = x1 respectively. The quadratic and cubic functions are power functions with whole number powers f (x) = x 2 and f (x) = x 3. Th reciprocal and reciprocal squared functions are power functions with negative whole number powers because they can be written as f (x) = x −1 and f (x) = x −2. The square and cube root functions are power functions with fractional powers because they can be written as f (x) = x1/2 or f (x) = x 1/3. Figure 1 Electron micrograph of E. Coli bacteria (credit: “Mattosaurus,” Wikimedia Commons) Chapter Outline 6.1 Exponential Functions 6.5 Logarithmic Properties 6.2 Graphs of Exponential Functions 6.6 Exponential and Logarithmic Equations 6.3 Logarithmic Functions 6.7 Exponential and Logarithmic Models 6.4 Graphs of Logarithmic Functions 6.8 Fitting Exponential Models to Data Introduction Focus in on a square centimeter of your skin. Look closer. Closer still. If you could look closely enough, you would see hundreds of thousands of microscopic organisms. They are bacteria, and they are not only on your skin, but in your mouth, nose, and even your intestines. In fact, the bacterial cells in your body at any given moment outnumber your own cells. But that is no reason to feel bad about yourself. While some bacteria can cause illness, many are healthy and even essential to the body. Bacteria commonly reproduce through a process called binary fission, during which one bacterial cell splits into two. When conditions are right, bacteria can reproduce very quickly. Unlike humans and other complex organisms, the time required to form a new generation of bacteria is often a matter of minutes or hours, as opposed to days or years.[16] For simplicity’s sake, suppose we begin with a culture of one bacterial cell that can divide every hour. Table 1 shows the number of bacterial cells at the end of each subsequent hour. We see that the single bacterial cell leads to over one thousand bacterial cells in just ten hours! And if we were to extrapolate the table to twenty-four hours, we would

deep_worked_example.stem: 根据教材片段，构造一道关于「指数函数」的建模或计算题，并说明解题步骤。
deep_worked_example.solution_outline: 先识别变量和数量关系，再建立表达式、图形或方程，最后解释结果在情境中的含义。

errors.description: 只记「指数函数」的公式或结论，不理解适用条件和变量含义。
解题时跳步，未把已知条件、关系式和结论之间的推理写完整。

exercises.stem: 根据课标要点，说明「指数函数」中最关键的数量关系或图形关系是什么。
exercises.answer: 应围绕：内容包括：函数概念与性质、幂函数、指数函数、对数函数、三角函数、函数应用。，说明概念、条件和表示方法。

exercises.stem: 设计一个生活情境，用「指数函数」建立模型并解释结果。
exercises.answer: 需写出已知量、未知量、关系式或图形表示，并解释结论含义。

real_world: 在购物、行程、测量或数据分析中寻找与「指数函数」相关的数量关系。
